title: DSIT cyber security newsletter - February 2025
body: "The monthly Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT) cyber security newsletter details the latest announcements, events and projects for people interested in the field of cyber security. This month’s edition includes:   New AI Cyber Security Code of Practice published Government responds to cyber governance consultation New research highlights how larger UK organisations are tackling the cyber threat Plan for Change delivers local cyber security programmes   You can sign up to receive the newsletter each month directly via email.  To ensure you receive the newsletter in your inbox please mark cybersecurity@dsit.gov.uk as one of your contacts.  If you have any questions please email cybersecurity@dsit.gov.uk.  Further editions of the newsletter can be found on the cyber security newsletter collection page.  "
